name: Minimalist Glass Villa
description: Wide, airy single-story villa with floor-to-ceiling glass walls, white quartz frame, and dark accent trim. Reads as a modern architect's vacation home — emphasizes openness and views.
notes: Wide floor plan, low height. Big windows (windowSize 3) and a wide entrance (doorWidth 2). Smooth_basalt accent picks out the foundation and roof line against the white quartz.
